yesterdayAnalysis: Completed Wednesday's planned 40-minute easy ROUVY ride (TSS 22, HR 117, NP well under 140w target) plus the 1,500m pool swim (TSS 16, HR 114). todayRecommendation: Today calls for 30 minutes very easy spin only, skipping the run to protect your legs heading into race week. Keep NP under 130w, HR easy conversational. This is pure maintenance — bike gets packed after this session for Sunday's drive to Salem.

keyInsight: Taper execution is textbook — controlled intensity, protecting the hip, and maintaining aerobic stimulus without accumulating fatigue 10 days out from Oregon 70.3.
